env.description: CORS allowed origins — set to your Vercel frontend URL (comma-separated for multiple)
Supabase service role key (preferred — allows server-side writes)
Supabase API key (fallback if SUPABASE_ROLE_KEY is not set)
Redis connection URL for alert deduplication (optional)
Path for the trained ML model — must be under /tmp on Vercel (read-only root filesystem)
Disable sentence-transformers on Vercel (not installed in requirements-vercel.txt)
